title: Firma: Civilization
description: The official Nifty Ships addon for TerraFirmaCraft! Ships, boats, navigation gameplay, and more!
body:
![The title "Firma: Civilization" is stylized in a Minecraft font and overlayed on an image of a ship at port while another ship sails in the distance.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6o49a8Vz/images/be949550ec5d0529af0bd469abd44e2f38ac1504.png)

**Please check out the online or in-game version of the Field Guide to learn the specifics about the features in Firma: Civilization!**
 

**Watercraft**

- Dugout Canoe and Canoe Paddle
- Kayak and Kayak Paddle
- Rowboat and Oars
- Rowboat and Canoe are fully in-world craftable!
- Removed vanilla-style boats!
- Full TFC field guide integration
- Customize boats by adding chests anywhere!
- Pull boats on leads!



**Navigation**

- Sextant
- Navigator's Timepiece
- Barometer
- Full TFC field guide integration
- Removed coordinates from the debug menu!


**Decoration**

- Added 2 new stone-age thatch blocks, crafted from straw, great for roofs and tents
  - Angled Thatch
    - Can be made into a full stair shape by using straw on the block in-world
  - Thatch Slab


THIS MOD IS EXCLUSIVELY HUMAN-MADE AND DOES NOT CONTAIN ASSETS, CODE, DOCUMENTATION, OR ANY OTHER CONTENT GENERATED BY A MODEL.
